seoTitle: Keriri Island vs Kerry — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Keriri Island and Kerry. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Keriri Island vs Kerry: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Keriri Island and Kerry.
heading: Keriri Island vs Kerry — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Keriri Island, Queensland and Kerry, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Keriri Island has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Kerry (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Keriri Island or Kerry safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Keriri Island has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Kerry scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Keriri Island scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Kerry scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Keriri Island or Kerry?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Keriri Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
